data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氧气的鉴别实验" goal="通过木条复燃实验鉴别集气瓶中的气体是否为氧气" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="wood_strip_1" type="wood_strip" />
      <Component id="tweezer_1" type="tweezer" />
      <Component id="gas_jar_1" type="gas_jar" capacity="500ml" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Oxygen_Gas" state="gas" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="gas_jar_1" reagent="O2" volume="0.5 L" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="tweezer_1" vessel="wood_strip_1" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="gas_jar_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="wood_strip_1" vessel="gas_jar_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 向集气瓶中充入氧气并将其固定在铁架台上，为鉴别实验做准备。
用镊子夹持木条，为后续插入集气瓶做准备。
将夹持的木条插入集气瓶，等待观察木条是否复燃，以鉴别瓶中气体是否为氧气。
